sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: WBLK-ETFP Stock Fund Price and Chart — EURONEXT:WBLK-ETFP
feed.summary: This article provides detailed financial information for the WisdomTree Blockchain UCITS ETF AccumUSD (WBLK-ETFP), traded on Euronext. It covers key statistics such as assets under management, fund flows, expense ratio, and inception date. The ETF passively tracks the WisdomTree Blockchain UCITS Index and invests primarily in stocks, with a global market-cap weighting scheme focused on the blockchain sector.

feed.title: Patrick Ennis joins Wipro (WIT) insider list with initial Form 3
feed.summary: Patrick J. Ennis, a director at Wipro Ltd (WIT), has filed an initial Form 3 with the SEC, indicating his beneficial ownership of securities as a company insider. This filing, dated March 20, 2026, lists his director status but does not report any stock transactions or specific share holdings, serving primarily as an initial statement of ownership. The document shows no buy, sell, or derivative transactions, classifying the filing impact and sentiment as neutral.

feed.title: Market Momentum: Latest News and Financial Insights on WEX
feed.summary: WEX Inc. stock is trending up by 3.43% due to a strategic acquisition of a European technology firm, which is expected to expand its market presence and leverage new solutions. The company reported strong financial performance with $2.66B in revenue, an 83% gross margin, and a 20.2% EBIT margin, reinforcing investor confidence despite competitive pressures and economic challenges. Its consistent cash flow, strategic market investments, and commitment to integrating new technologies underpin a robust market outlook and sustained credibility.

feed.title: Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. Announces New CEO and Engagement of Financial Advisor to Evaluate Strategic Alternatives
feed.summary: Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. (NASDAQ: VGAS) has appointed George Burdette as its new CEO, who will also retain his CFO role. The company has engaged Roth Capital Partners to evaluate strategic alternatives, including a potential sale or merger, as part of its ongoing restructuring and cost reduction initiatives. These actions aim to optimize the deployment of Verde's STG+® technology and maximize shareholder value.

feed.title: "It's still increasing": Dominion Energy customers show outrage as bills surge
feed.summary: Dominion Energy customers are expressing outrage over significant increases in their utility bills, with one customer reporting a bill over $600 in February, despite using less energy than the previous year. This customer has started a petition calling for an independent audit of Dominion Energy to investigate the unexplained hikes. Dominion Energy attributes the increases to seasonal variations and extreme temperatures impacting heating system costs.

feed.title: Tuya Inc. Sees Boost in Stock as Q4 Revenue Exceeds Estimates
feed.summary: Tuya Inc. has seen its stock rise by 6.22% following a strong Q4 2025 revenue beat, reaching $84.5 million against an expectation of $79.5 million. The company reported robust profitability, expanding margins, and declared a dividend of $0.0605 per share, backed by over $1 billion in cash reserves and no debt. Despite some bearish technical patterns and challenges like tariffs, the growth in SaaS and smart solutions, coupled with strategic cost management, positions Tuya favorably for future expansion.

feed.title: Technical Analysis of T. Rowe Price Value ETF (AMEX:TVAL)
feed.summary: This article provides a technical analysis of the T. Rowe Price Value ETF (AMEX:TVAL), utilizing various indicators such as moving averages, oscillators, and pivots across multiple timeframes. It presents a summary gauge of technical ratings, indicating a "sell" for today, but notes changing market conditions and suggests the importance of combining technical analysis with other data and news. The article also includes a Q&A section explaining key technical analysis concepts.

feed.title: Victoria's Secret Shares Face a Critical Test Amid Mixed Results
feed.summary: Victoria's Secret & Company is facing a critical period with mixed financial results and legal scrutiny. While Q4 revenue grew by 8%, the stock plummeted 7% due to a significant $119.6 million impairment charge for the "Adore Me" brand and new investor lawsuits focusing on strategic disclosures. The company is accelerating its "Path to Potential" turnaround plan, but the coming quarters will be crucial for investor confidence.

feed.title: TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) Director Michael Bucella Acquires 1,665 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: TeraWulf (NASDAQ:WULF) Director Michael Bucella recently acquired 1,665 shares of the company's stock for $25,041.60, increasing his total holdings to 280,052 shares valued at over $4.2 million. This insider buying signals confidence, despite mixed signals including a significant share sale by the CFO and an analyst downgrade. TeraWulf is pivoting to AI/HPC workloads, securing large commercial deals, and planning a $3 billion Kentucky data center.

feed.title: Henry Schein (NASDAQ:HSIC) CEO Thomas Popeck Sells 1,355 Shares
feed.summary: Henry Schein CEO Thomas Popeck sold 1,355 shares of the company's stock on March 19th for a total of $98,630.45, reducing his stake by 1.55%. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and provided positive FY2026 guidance. While analyst sentiment is mixed with an average "Hold" rating, Zacks has updated its EPS estimates for future quarters with both positive and negative revisions.

feed.title: Insider Selling: USANA Health Sciences (NYSE:USNA) Director Sells 1,058 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: USANA Health Sciences (NYSE:USNA) Director Gilbert Fuller sold 1,058 shares of company stock on March 20th, 2026, for a total of $17,986.00 at an average price of $17.00 per share. The stock traded down to $16.88, near its 52-week low, despite the company beating quarterly EPS expectations. Institutional investors hold over 54% of the shares, and analyst ratings are mixed.

feed.title: Walker & Dunlop (NYSE:WD) Director Purchases $45,780.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Walker & Dunlop (NYSE:WD) Director Dana Schmaltz purchased 1,000 shares of the company's stock for $45,780.00 on March 18th, increasing her total holdings to 84,325 shares. This insider purchase comes after the company reported a significant earnings miss and slightly below-expectations revenue, although it recently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.68 per share, resulting in a 6.2% yield. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating for the stock with an average price target of $81.25.

feed.title: Validated Expertise for HPC Workloads on AWS
feed.summary: NetApp has achieved the AWS High Performance Computing (HPC) Competency for ONTAP, signifying its validated expertise and proven customer success in supporting HPC workloads on AWS. This recognition highlights NetApp's ability to provide scalable and reliable storage solutions through Amazon FSx for NetApp ONTAP and Cloud Volumes ONTAP, which are crucial for demanding HPC environments in various industries. Customers like Rivian, Joby Aviation, and Arm leverage NetApp's ONTAP-based solutions on AWS to optimize their complex simulation, design, and analysis workflows.

feed.title: Is Roper Technologies (ROP) Now Offering Value After A 37.8% One-Year Share Price Slide?
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) has experienced a 37.8% share price decline over the past year, prompting investors to consider its current valuation. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis estimates an intrinsic value of $619.76 per share, indicating a 42.9% discount from its current trading price of approximately $353, suggesting undervaluation. Additionally, ROP's P/E ratio of 23.7x is below the industry average of 29.0x and its own Fair Ratio of 27.1x, further supporting the idea that the stock may be undervalued.

feed.title: Texas Roadhouse (TXRH) president sells 4,450 shares at $171
feed.summary: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. president Regina A. Tobin reported selling 4,450 shares of common stock at $171.00 per share on March 19, 2026. Following this transaction, she directly owns 13,778 shares and holds restricted stock units for an additional 15,300 shares vesting in 2027 and 2028, contingent on her continued service. The sale, detailed in an SEC Form 4 filing, is considered to have a very high impact and negative sentiment.

The company's shares traded down following the announcement, and it holds an average "Hold" rating from analysts with a target price of $137.64.

feed.title: VRCA Investors Have the Opportunity to Join Investigation of Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is investigating Verrica Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: VRCA) for potential breaches of fiduciary duty by its directors and management. Shareholders of Verrica are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their rights and participate in the investigation.

feed.title: Vizsla Silver VZLA.TO (TSX) earnings 20 Mar 2026: drilling will set near-term outlook
feed.summary: Vizsla Silver Corp. (VZLA.TO) reported earnings on March 20, 2026, with shares trading down 4.58% intraday as investors await clarity on drilling updates from the Panuco project. The company's financial performance, including a negative EPS of -0.49 and a market cap of CAD 1.51B, is heavily influenced by exploration results and cash management. Analysts and Meyka AI project potential future upside dependent on positive drill news and capital access, despite current oversold technical indicators.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Thomas Popeck Sells Shares of Henry Schein Inc (HSIC)
feed.summary: Thomas Popeck, CEO of Henry Schein Products, recently sold 1,355 shares of Henry Schein Inc (HSIC), leaving him with 86,182 shares. This transaction is part of a trend over the last year where insiders have sold 6 times with only 1 buy. Henry Schein Inc, a healthcare products and services provider, is currently trading at $72.79, which is modestly undervalued according to its GF Value of $81.44.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Matthew Bob Sells 23,000 Shares of APA Corp (APA)
feed.summary: Matthew Bob, a Director at APA Corp (APA), sold 23,000 shares of the company on March 18, 2026, reducing his holding to 6,634 shares. The transaction, reported in an SEC Filing, occurred while the stock was trading at $36.23, indicating that the stock is significantly overvalued according to its GuruFocus Value of $24.56. Over the last year, there has been one insider buy and one insider sell for APA Corp.

feed.title: Oracle Stock Has Lost More Than Half Its Value in 6 Months. It May Finally Be Time to Buy.
feed.summary: Oracle's stock has dropped over 50% in the last six months, primarily due to investor concerns about its substantial capital expenditure plans for AI data centers. Despite this, the company reported accelerating revenue growth and surging profits in its fiscal third quarter, with cloud infrastructure revenue up 84% year-over-year. Oracle also boasts a massive $553 billion in remaining performance obligations, largely from AI contracts, many of which are structured with customer prepayments, making its valuation of about 19 times forward earnings attractive for long-term investors.

feed.title: International Paper to build a new sustainable packaging facility in Rankin County
feed.summary: International Paper announced plans to invest $225 million in a new 468,000-square-foot sustainable packaging facility in Rankin County, Mississippi. This new plant, located in Brandon, will replace the existing Richland box plant, aiming to improve efficiency, product quality, and customer service. Construction is set to begin in June 2026, with operations expected to commence in late 2027, transferring all employees from the old facility.

feed.title: Form DEF 14A Ameriprise Financial Inc. For: 20 March
feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form DEF 14A by Ameriprise Financial Inc. for March 20. It briefly mentions the company name and filing date.

feed.title: NextEra Energy subsidiary sells $600 million in junior subordinated debentures
feed.summary: NextEra Energy Capital Holdings, a subsidiary of NextEra Energy, has sold $600 million in Series Z Junior Subordinated Debentures due April 15, 2086, bearing an interest rate of 6.50% per year. This transaction adds to NextEra's total debt, which stands at $97.2 billion against a market capitalization of $187 billion. The company has a history of 56 consecutive years of dividend payments and has recently undertaken other significant financial and strategic initiatives, including a $2 billion capital raise and presidential approval for new natural gas-powered generation projects.

feed.title: TCPC INVESTOR ALERT: Bronstein, Gewirtz and Grossman, LLC Announces that BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. Stockholders with Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit!
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has announced a class action lawsuit against BlackRock TCP Capital Corp. (NASDAQ:TCPC) and its officers. The lawsuit seeks to recover damages for investors who purchased BlackRock securities between November 6, 2024, and January 23, 2026, alleging that the company made misleading statements regarding the valuation of its investments and the effectiveness of its portfolio restructuring efforts. Investors who suffered losses have until April 6, 2026, to request to be appointed as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Netcapital Inc. Announces Closing of Public Offering
feed.summary: Netcapital Inc. announced the closing of its public offering of 1,247,000 shares of common stock at $1.40 per share, generating gross proceeds of $1,745,800. The company also granted underwriters an option to purchase an additional 187,000 shares. The net proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, working capital, and general and administrative expenses.

feed.title: Koru Medical Systems targets $47.5M–$50M revenue in 2026 as leadership transitions and international expansion accelerate
feed.summary: Koru Medical Systems is projecting revenue between $47.5 million and $50 million for 2026, driven by new leadership and an acceleration of international expansion efforts. The company is actively working to grow its market presence and financial performance in the coming years.

feed.title: Industry Watch: Two Harbors receives rival bid, while CrossCountry, TMC and others make notable moves
feed.summary: Two Harbors Investment Corp. has received an unsolicited acquisition bid of $10.70 per share, challenging its proposed merger with UWM Holdings Corp. Meanwhile, CrossCountry Mortgage is acquiring Summit Funding Inc. and expanding its builder division, and CommLoan has secured regulatory approval to operate its AI-powered mortgage marketplace in all 50 states. Other industry players like The Mortgage Collaborative, Floify, Onity Group, Mortgage Automation Technologies, nCino, Argyle, and Docutech have also announced new products, rebrandings, or integrations to enhance their services.

feed.title: Cellectis (NASDAQ:CLLS) reports full year 2025 results
feed.summary: Cellectis (NASDAQ:CLLS) announced strong financial and operational results for fiscal year 2025, highlighting significant clinical advancements in its CAR-T programs. The company reported a 100% Overall Response Rate for its lead candidate, lasme-cel, in B-ALL and an 88% ORR for eti-cel in AML. Financially, Cellectis ended the year with $211 million in cash, extending its runway into the second half of 2027.

feed.title: Why Quanta Services (PWR) Stands Out as a Leading Long-Term Investment
feed.summary: Quanta Services (PWR) has been highlighted as a leading long-term investment due to its strong performance and favorable earnings outlook. Added to the Zacks Focus List in December 2021, PWR shares have surged over 400%. The company maintains a "Hold" rating from Zacks, with analysts projecting significant earnings growth.

feed.title: Pepsi® Global Unveils Pepsi Football Nation – A New Global Platform Celebrating Football Culture Beyond the 90 Minutes
feed.summary: Pepsi Global has launched "Pepsi Football Nation," a new platform celebrating football culture beyond the pitch, connecting fans worldwide through their shared love of the sport. Built on Pepsi's 50-year heritage in football, the platform unifies partnerships and content across digital, social, retail, and live brand experiences. It aims to elevate the emotional energy of football by focusing on fan culture, rituals, and the community aspect of the game.

The piece also offers external links to Bank of America's homepage and suggests signing up for advanced bond data.

feed.title: Despite setbacks, TN Gov. Bill Lee says BlueOval will bring West TN change
feed.summary: Tennessee Governor Bill Lee praised Ford's BlueOval City project during a visit to a nearby trade school, emphasizing its "once in a lifetime" opportunities despite recent changes. The project, initially a $5.6 billion investment for electric truck production, has shifted to gas-powered trucks and experienced layoffs. Lee highlighted the development's potential for generational change in West Tennessee.

feed.title: Investment Firm Boosts Holdings in Sterilization Provider Sotera Health - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Inherent Management Corp. has increased its stake in Sotera Health Company by acquiring an additional 200,050 shares, valued at approximately $3.31 million, in the fourth quarter. This acquisition has brought Sotera Health's representation in the investment manager's portfolio to 10.6%, making it the fifth-largest holding. Despite the company's consistent revenue growth and recent share price increase over the past year, its stock has declined since the last quarter's end due to ongoing investor concerns regarding litigation and other factors.

feed.title: Is Blackstone (BX) Now Attractive After A 30% Year To Date Share Price Decline
feed.summary: This article analyzes Blackstone (BX) after a 30% year-to-date share price decline. Using an Excess Returns analysis, Simply Wall St suggests Blackstone is undervalued by 11.7%, with an intrinsic value of US$125.05 per share. However, a Price vs. Earnings approach indicates the stock is overvalued, trading above its calculated "Fair Ratio."

feed.title: Flowserve Board Expansion Brings Duke Energy CFO Oversight To Project Risks
feed.summary: Flowserve (NYSE:FLS) has appointed Duke Energy CFO Brian Savoy to its Board of Directors and Audit Committee, also expanding the board's size. This move aims to enhance financial and risk oversight, especially considering Flowserve's involvement in energy infrastructure, clean energy projects, and recent stock performance fluctuations. Investors will be watching how this refreshed board structure influences capital allocation, audit oversight, and risk management.

feed.title: Quanta Services, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.11 (NYSE:PWR)
feed.summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.11 per share, payable on April 10th to shareholders of record on April 2nd. This represents an annualized dividend of $0.44 and a yield of approximately 0.1%, with a payout ratio around 3.7%. The company has consistently increased its dividend for six consecutive years and analysts expect continued coverage given projected earnings.

feed.title: A Look At Two Harbors Investment (TWO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound And Longer Term Weakness
feed.summary: Two Harbors Investment (TWO) has experienced mixed performance, including a recent 19.4% gain over the past week, but with declines over the past month, three months, and significantly over the past one and five years. The stock currently trades at a Price/Sales (P/S) ratio of 3x, which is considered overvalued compared to an estimated fair P/S of 0.3x, despite being lower than the industry average. However, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggests the company might be undervalued at $10.71 per share, indicating conflicting signals for investors regarding its long-term value.

feed.title: Lifeway Foods: Smolyansky sells $187k in shares
feed.summary: Ludmila Smolyansky, a significant owner in Lifeway Foods Inc (NASDAQ:LWAY), sold 10,000 shares for $187,399, with the stock trading near its 52-week low. Despite the recent dip and a Q4 2025 earnings miss, the company remains profitable, holds more cash than debt, and is considered undervalued by InvestingPro. Benchmark maintains a Buy rating, citing revenue growth aligning with their estimates.

feed.title: Omnicom Faces Challenges as Communication Services Sector Declines Due to Ongoing Fed Uncertainty
feed.summary: The Communications Services sector, including companies like Omnicom Group and News Corp, is facing significant pressure due to shifting market sentiment away from risk-taking and ongoing uncertainty surrounding the Federal Reserve's interest rate policies. Despite strong individual company performances, macroeconomic concerns and skepticism regarding the "easy-money narrative" are leading to sector-wide underperformance and increased scrutiny of valuations. The future outlook depends heavily on the Fed's actual policy decisions and companies providing strong results alongside optimistic future guidance.

feed.title: Director buys 1,665 TeraWulf (WULF) shares in open market
feed.summary: TeraWulf director Michael C. Bucella purchased 1,665 shares of WULF common stock on March 20, 2026, at a price of $15.04 per share, according to a recent SEC Form 4 filing. This open-market transaction increases his direct ownership to 280,052 shares. The filing indicates a positive sentiment towards the stock from this insider activity.

feed.title: Union Pacific Celebrates America’s 250th with New Locomotives No. 4547 and No. 1776
feed.summary: Union Pacific is celebrating America's 250th anniversary by unveiling two new commemorative locomotives, No. 4547 and No. 1776, and sending its historic Big Boy No. 4014 steam locomotive on an East Coast tour. The No. 1776 locomotive will feature an American flag and America250 logo, while the No. 4547 honors President Donald J. Trump with American flags. The Big Boy tour will include stops in multiple states, culminating in Philadelphia for Fourth of July celebrations.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands CEO Dumont sells $3.29 million in LVS stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands Chairman and CEO Patrick Dumont sold 60,165 shares of LVS common stock for approximately $3.29 million on March 17, 2026. Simultaneously, Dumont exercised options to acquire 61,740 shares at an exercise price of $52.53. These transactions occur as the company recently reported strong Q4 2025 earnings and underwent executive leadership changes with Dumont taking on multiple top roles.

feed.summary: This article announces the filing of Form 144 for MetLife Inc. on March 20. Form 144 is filed with the SEC by individuals who intend to sell restricted or controlled securities.
